segments.text: Why is Tobleron the only chocolate shaped like a triangle? It was not random. It was a master plan to build a longlasting legacy. While other brands
made flat boring rectangles, Tobleron made a 3D triangle to mimic the Swiss apps. This made them instantly stand out and become a global legend. But there
was this huge problem. Cool shape is extremely safe to copy. To prove that they were true original, they stamped the famous Matterhorn Mountain right
onto their packaging. Finally, they got the trademark. But the creators wanted to go one step further. They secretly wanted to honor their hometown Burn
without ruining the beautiful design. So they used a brilliant negative space logo. Look closely at the white space inside the mountain. There is a hidden
bear. Burn is famously known as a city of bears. They hid their legacy right in plain sight. Pure genius. For more amazing design content, subscribe.
